title: EverPotion
body:
EverPotion gives player the ability to use refillable potions. You can expand potion slots and customize your own effect set. (Press R by default)

There are also many config options provided for pack makers.

EverPotion is inspired by the game Secrets of Grindea.

By default:

 - R - Use potion
 - Shift + R - Change potion cores
 - Check JEI for the recipes
 - <=1.18.2: Kill mobs to unlock more potion slots
